title: Docker Compose Port Mapping Validator with Incorrect Port Range

statement.inputFormat: Docker Compose configuration file in JSON format as a string
statement.outputFormat: True if all port mappings are valid, False otherwise
statement.notes: The function should only check the port mappings and ignore other configuration options.

constraints.description: Maximum number of services in the configuration file

hints.text: Check the port number against the valid range

editorial.title: Validating Docker Compose Port Mappings
editorial.intuition: The function should iterate over the service port mappings and check if each port number is within the valid range.
editorial.bruteForce: You can use a simple loop to check each port number against the valid range.
editorial.optimalSolution: Use a JSON parser to extract the port mappings and check if they are within the valid range.
editorial.proofOfCorrectness: The function should return True if all port mappings are valid and False otherwise.
editorial.dryRun: Test the function with the provided examples to see if it returns the correct output.
commonMistakes: Not checking the port number against the valid range
